---
title: "DORA & CoARA in Swiss Higher Education"
format:
  dashboard:
    css: ../dashboard-common.css
author: "Dr. Moritz Mähr"
description: "An interactive dashboard showcasing the adoption of DORA and CoARA among Swiss Higher Education Institutions."
image: images/dashboard-screenshot.png
image-alt: "Screenshot of the DORA and CoARA dashboard with value boxes and an interactive map"
image-caption: "Dashboard screenshot from the NAIF website, captured on 2026-03-04."
date: today
draft: false
resources:
  - hei.csv
  - hei.xlsx
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import html

import folium
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

df = pd.read_csv("hei.csv")
excel_df = pd.read_csv("hei.csv", dtype=str).fillna("")

EXCEL_EXPORT_FILENAME = "hei.xlsx"

TYPE_ORDER = ["University", "Univ. Inst.", "UAS", "UAS Inst.", "UTE"]
TYPE_COLOURS = {
    "University": "#2563EB",
    "Univ. Inst.": "#7C3AED",
    "UAS": "#F59E0B",
    "UAS Inst.": "#DB2777",
    "UTE": "#0F766E",
}
TYPE_LABELS = {
    "University": "Universities",
    "Univ. Inst.": "University institutes",
    "UAS": "Universities of applied sciences (UAS)",
    "UAS Inst.": "UAS institutes",
    "UTE": "Teacher education institutions",
}

DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR = "#64748B"
MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR = "#0F172A"
MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR = "#111827"
SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS = [[45.75, 5.85], [47.95, 10.65]]

LEGEND_STYLE = (
    "position: fixed; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.97); "
    "padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #CBD5E1; "
    "box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12); font-family: sans-serif; "
    "font-size: 13px; color: #111827; z-index: 9999; line-height: 1.35;"
)
LEGEND_SYMBOL_WRAP_STYLE = (
    "position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 14px; height: 14px; "
    "margin-right: 8px; vertical-align: text-top;"
)
LEGEND_SWATCH_STYLE = (
    "position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 999px; border: 1.5px solid #111827;"
)
LEGEND_MEMBER_DOT_STYLE = (
    "position: absolute; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 999px; background: #111827; "
    "top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);"
)
WIKIDATA_BASE = "https://www.wikidata.org"
WIKIDATA_PATH = "/wiki/"
CROSSREF_BASE = "https://api.crossref.org"
CROSSREF_FUNDER_PATH = "/funders/"
GEONAMES_BASE = "https://www.geonames.org"
GEONAMES_PATH = "/"


def normalise_yes_no(value: object) -> str:
    """Normalise status values to Yes/No/Unknown."""
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "Unknown"
    text = str(value).strip().lower()
    if text in {"yes", "true", "1"}:
        return "Yes"
    if text in {"no", "false", "0"}:
        return "No"
    return "Unknown"


def format_identifier(value: object) -> str:
    """Convert IDs to stable strings and remove float artefacts."""
    if pd.isna(value):
        return ""

    text = str(value).strip()
    if not text:
        return ""

    if text.endswith(".0"):
        try:
            numeric_value = float(text)
            if numeric_value.is_integer():
                return str(int(numeric_value))
        except ValueError:
            return text

    return text


def format_plain_text(value: object) -> str:
    """Return plain text values with a fallback dash."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    return text if text else "-"


def format_identifier_list(value: object) -> str:
    """Render pipe-separated identifier lists with soft wrap points."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    if not text:
        return "-"

    parts = [html.escape(part.strip()) for part in text.split("|") if part.strip()]
    if not parts:
        return "-"

    return (
        '<span class="dashboard-id-list">'
        + '<wbr><span class="dashboard-id-sep">|</span><wbr>'.join(
            f'<span class="dashboard-id-token">{part}</span>' for part in parts
        )
        + "</span>"
    )


def format_type_label(value: object) -> str:
    """Return the full label for an institution type."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    if not text:
        return "Unknown"
    return TYPE_LABELS.get(text, text)


def type_order_key(value: object) -> int:
    """Return a stable sort key for institution types."""
    text = format_identifier(value)
    try:
        return TYPE_ORDER.index(text)
    except ValueError:
        return len(TYPE_ORDER)


def pct(value: int, denominator: int) -> str:
    """Format a value as a percentage string."""
    if denominator == 0:
        return "0.0%"
    return f"{(100 * value / denominator):.1f}%"


def write_dataframe_xlsx(
    dataframe: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str, sheet_name: str = "Institutions"
) -> None:
    """Write the dashboard dataset as a native XLSX workbook."""
    with pd.ExcelWriter(output_path, engine="xlsxwriter") as writer:
        dataframe.to_excel(writer, sheet_name=sheet_name, index=False)
        worksheet = writer.sheets[sheet_name]
        worksheet.freeze_panes(1, 0)
        worksheet.autofilter(0, 0, len(dataframe), len(dataframe.columns) - 1)

        for column_index, column_name in enumerate(dataframe.columns):
            values = dataframe[column_name].astype(str)
            max_length = max(len(column_name), *(len(value) for value in values))
            worksheet.set_column(column_index, column_index, min(max_length + 2, 40))


write_dataframe_xlsx(excel_df, EXCEL_EXPORT_FILENAME, sheet_name="Swiss HEIs")


def make_link(url: str, label: str) -> str:
    """Create a safe external link."""
    return f'<a href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{html.escape(label)}</a>'


def link_ror(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a ROR identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    return make_link(identifier, identifier)


def link_wikidata(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a Wikidata identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    if not identifier.startswith("Q"):
        identifier = f"Q{identifier}"
    url = f"{WIKIDATA_BASE}{WIKIDATA_PATH}{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def link_isni(value: object) -> str:
    """Link an ISNI identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    compact = identifier.replace(" ", "")
    return make_link(f"https://isni.org/isni/{compact}", identifier)


def link_crossref_funder(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a Crossref funder identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    url = f"{CROSSREF_BASE}{CROSSREF_FUNDER_PATH}{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def link_geonames(value: object) -> str:
    """Link a GeoNames identifier."""
    identifier = format_identifier(value)
    if not identifier:
        return "-"
    url = f"{GEONAMES_BASE}{GEONAMES_PATH}{identifier}"
    return make_link(url, identifier)


def make_legend_symbol(colour: str, show_member_dot: bool = False) -> str:
    """Build the HTML swatch used in the map legend."""
    member_dot_html = (
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_MEMBER_DOT_STYLE}"></span>' if show_member_dot else ""
    )
    return (
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_SYMBOL_WRAP_STYLE}">'
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_SWATCH_STYLE}background:{colour};"></span>'
        f"{member_dot_html}"
        "</span>"
    )


def add_type_legend(
    map_obj: folium.Map, visible_types: set[str], show_member_note: bool = False
) -> None:
    """Attach a type legend to a Folium map."""
    legend_html = f'<div style="{LEGEND_STYLE}">'
    for institution_type in TYPE_ORDER:
        if institution_type not in visible_types:
            continue
        legend_html += (
            '<div style="margin-bottom: 4px;">'
            f"{make_legend_symbol(TYPE_COLOURS.get(institution_type, DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR))}"
            f"{html.escape(TYPE_LABELS[institution_type])}"
            "</div>"
        )

    if show_member_note:
        legend_html += (
            '<div style="margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid #E5E7EB;">'
            f'{make_legend_symbol("#D1D5DB", show_member_dot=True)}'
            "CoARA member"
            "</div>"
        )

    legend_html += "</div>"
    _ = map_obj.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(legend_html))


def display_html_table(dataframe: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    """Render a dataframe in a scrollable table container."""
    table_html = dataframe.to_html(
        escape=False,
        index=False,
        classes="table table-sm table-striped align-middle",
        border=0,
    )
    display(HTML(f'<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">{table_html}</div>'))


def make_tooltip(label: object) -> folium.Tooltip:
    """Create a sticky tooltip with the full institution name."""
    return folium.Tooltip(
        html.escape(format_plain_text(label)),
        sticky=True,
        direction="top",
        opacity=0.96,
    )


def add_member_dot(map_obj: folium.Map, location: list[float]) -> None:
    """Overlay a black centre dot for CoARA members."""
    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=location,
        radius=3,
        color=MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR,
        weight=1,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR,
        fill_opacity=1.0,
        interactive=False,
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(map_obj)


status_columns = ["dora_signatory", "coara_signatory", "coara_member"]

for column in status_columns:
    if column in df.columns:
        df[column] = df[column].map(normalise_yes_no)

total = len(df)
dora_count = int(df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes").sum())
coara_count = int(df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes").sum())
coara_member_count = int(df["coara_member"].eq("Yes").sum())

both_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes")).sum()
)
dora_only_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("No")).sum()
)
coara_only_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("No") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes")).sum()
)
neither_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("No") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("No")).sum()
)
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const switzerlandBounds = [
    [45.75, 5.85],
    [47.95, 10.65],
  ];

  const stripMapIframeFullscreen = () => {
    document
      .querySelectorAll(".quarto-dashboard .cell-output-display iframe[allowfullscreen]")
      .forEach((frame) => {
        frame.removeAttribute("allowfullscreen");
        frame.removeAttribute("webkitallowfullscreen");
        frame.removeAttribute("mozallowfullscreen");
      });
  };

  const refreshLeafletMaps = () => {
    document
      .querySelectorAll(".quarto-dashboard .cell-output-display iframe")
      .forEach((frame) => {
        try {
          const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
          if (!frameWindow?.L?.Map) {
            return;
          }

          Object.values(frameWindow).forEach((value) => {
            if (value instanceof frameWindow.L.Map) {
              value.invalidateSize();
              value.fitBounds(switzerlandBounds);
            }
          });
        } catch (_error) {
          // Ignore iframe timing issues while tabs are switching.
        }
      });
  };

  stripMapIframeFullscreen();
  window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 250);

  document.addEventListener("shown.bs.tab", () => {
    stripMapIframeFullscreen();
    window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 150);
  });

  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
    stripMapIframeFullscreen();
    window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 150);
  });
  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
});
</script>
```

## Row {height=100%}

### Column {width=28%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total HEIs"
dict(icon="building", color="light", value=total)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "DORA Signatories"
dict(icon="pen", color="light", value=dora_count)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "CoARA Signatories"
dict(icon="pen-fill", color="light", value=coara_count)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "CoARA Members"
dict(icon="person-check", color="light", value=coara_member_count)
```

### Column {.tabset}

#### DORA Signatories

```{python}
#| echo: false
dora_df = df[
    (df["dora_signatory"] == "Yes") & df["lat"].notna() & df["lon"].notna()
].copy()

m = folium.Map(
    location=[46.8, 8.3],
    zoom_start=7,
    control_scale=True,
    tiles="cartodbpositron",
)
m.fit_bounds(SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS)

for _, r in dora_df.iterrows():
    institution_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["name"]))
    short_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["short_name"]))
    institution_type = html.escape(format_type_label(r["type"]))
    town = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["town"]))

    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[r["lat"], r["lon"]],
        radius=10,
        color=MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR,
        weight=2,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=TYPE_COLOURS.get(r["type"], DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR),
        fill_opacity=0.92,
        tooltip=make_tooltip(r["name"]),
        popup=(
            f"<b>{institution_name}</b><br>"
            f"Short name: {short_name}<br>"
            f"Type: {institution_type}<br>"
            f"Town: {town}<br>"
            f"CoARA signatory: {r['coara_signatory']}"
        ),
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(m)

add_type_legend(m, set(dora_df["type"].dropna().tolist()))

display(m)
```

#### CoARA Signatories

```{python}
#| echo: false
coara_df = df[
    (df["coara_signatory"] == "Yes") & df["lat"].notna() & df["lon"].notna()
].copy()

m = folium.Map(
    location=[46.8, 8.3],
    zoom_start=7,
    control_scale=True,
    tiles="cartodbpositron",
)
m.fit_bounds(SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS)

for _, r in coara_df.iterrows():
    institution_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["name"]))
    short_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["short_name"]))
    institution_type = html.escape(format_type_label(r["type"]))
    town = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["town"]))
    member_text = "Yes" if r["coara_member"] == "Yes" else "No"
    location = [r["lat"], r["lon"]]

    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=location,
        radius=10,
        color=MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR,
        weight=2,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=TYPE_COLOURS.get(r["type"], DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR),
        fill_opacity=0.92,
        tooltip=make_tooltip(r["name"]),
        popup=(
            f"<b>{institution_name}</b><br>"
            f"Short name: {short_name}<br>"
            f"Type: {institution_type}<br>"
            f"Town: {town}<br>"
            f"DORA signatory: {r['dora_signatory']}<br>"
            f"CoARA member: {member_text}"
        ),
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(m)

    if r["coara_member"] == "Yes":
        add_member_dot(m, location)

add_type_legend(
    m,
    set(coara_df["type"].dropna().tolist()),
    show_member_note=True,
)

display(m)
```

#### About this dashboard

```{python}
#| echo: false
about_html = f"""
<div class=\"dashboard-about\">
  <p>
    This dashboard was prepared by <strong>Dr Moritz Mähr</strong> for NAIF. It brings together
    <strong>{total}</strong> Swiss higher education institutions and shows how many are DORA
    signatories, CoARA signatories, or CoARA members.
  </p>
  <p>
    Included institution groups are universities, university institutes, universities of applied
    sciences (UAS), UAS institutes, and teacher education institutions. Hover over a marker to
    see the full institution name, then click for more detail.
  </p>
  <p>
    On the CoARA map, a <strong>black centre dot</strong> marks CoARA members. The current dataset
    includes <strong>{dora_count}</strong> DORA signatories, <strong>{coara_count}</strong> CoARA
    signatories, and <strong>{coara_member_count}</strong> CoARA members.
  </p>
  <p>
    The source data used in this dashboard is available from the download tab.
  </p>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(about_html))
```

#### All Institutions

```{python}
#| echo: false
all_institutions = df[
    [
        "name",
        "short_name",
        "type",
        "town",
        "dora_signatory",
        "coara_signatory",
        "coara_member",
        "swissuniversities_name",
        "openalex_ids",
        "openorgs_ids",
        "ror_id",
        "wikidata_id",
        "isni_id",
        "crossref_funder_id",
        "geonames_id",
    ]
].copy()

all_institutions["short_name"] = all_institutions["short_name"].apply(format_plain_text)
all_institutions["type"] = all_institutions["type"].apply(format_type_label)
all_institutions["town"] = all_institutions["town"].apply(format_plain_text)
all_institutions["swissuniversities_name"] = all_institutions["swissuniversities_name"].apply(
    format_plain_text
)
all_institutions["openalex_ids"] = all_institutions["openalex_ids"].apply(
    format_identifier_list
)
all_institutions["openorgs_ids"] = all_institutions["openorgs_ids"].apply(
    format_identifier_list
)
all_institutions["ror_id"] = all_institutions["ror_id"].apply(link_ror)
all_institutions["wikidata_id"] = all_institutions["wikidata_id"].apply(link_wikidata)
all_institutions["isni_id"] = all_institutions["isni_id"].apply(link_isni)
all_institutions["crossref_funder_id"] = all_institutions["crossref_funder_id"].apply(
    link_crossref_funder
)
all_institutions["geonames_id"] = all_institutions["geonames_id"].apply(link_geonames)
all_institutions["type_order"] = df["type"].apply(type_order_key)

all_institutions = all_institutions.rename(
    columns={
        "name": "Institution",
        "short_name": "Short",
        "type": "Type",
        "town": "Town",
        "dora_signatory": "DORA",
        "coara_signatory": "CoARA sig.",
        "coara_member": "CoARA member",
        "swissuniversities_name": "swissuniversities",
        "openalex_ids": "OpenAlex",
        "openorgs_ids": "OpenOrgs",
        "ror_id": "ROR",
        "wikidata_id": "Wikidata",
        "isni_id": "ISNI",
        "crossref_funder_id": "Crossref",
        "geonames_id": "GeoNames",
    }
)

all_institutions = all_institutions.sort_values(
    ["type_order", "Town", "Institution"]
).reset_index(drop=True)

all_institutions_overview = all_institutions[
    [
        "Institution",
        "Short",
        "Type",
        "Town",
        "DORA",
        "CoARA sig.",
        "CoARA member",
        "swissuniversities",
    ]
].copy()

all_institutions_identifiers = all_institutions[
    [
        "Institution",
        "OpenAlex",
        "OpenOrgs",
        "ROR",
        "Wikidata",
        "ISNI",
        "Crossref",
        "GeoNames",
    ]
].copy()

display(HTML('<h5 class="dashboard-subheading">Overview</h5>'))
display_html_table(all_institutions_overview)
display(HTML('<h5 class="dashboard-subheading">Identifiers</h5>'))
display_html_table(all_institutions_identifiers)
```

#### Statistics

```{python}
#| echo: false
stats_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        ["DORA signatories", dora_count, pct(dora_count, total)],
        ["CoARA signatories", coara_count, pct(coara_count, total)],
        ["CoARA members", coara_member_count, pct(coara_member_count, total)],
        ["DORA + CoARA", both_count, pct(both_count, total)],
        ["DORA only", dora_only_count, pct(dora_only_count, total)],
        ["CoARA only", coara_only_count, pct(coara_only_count, total)],
        ["Neither", neither_count, pct(neither_count, total)],
    ],
    columns=["Metric", "Count", "Share"],
)
display_html_table(stats_df)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
type_stats = (
    df.assign(type_order=df["type"].apply(type_order_key))
    .groupby("type", dropna=False)
    .agg(
        Institutions=("name", "size"),
        DORA=("dora_signatory", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        CoARA=("coara_signatory", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        CoARA_members=("coara_member", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        type_order=("type_order", "min"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

type_stats["DORA %"] = (100 * type_stats["DORA"] / type_stats["Institutions"]).map(
    lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%"
)
type_stats["CoARA %"] = (
    100 * type_stats["CoARA"] / type_stats["Institutions"]
).map(lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%")
type_stats["CoARA member %"] = (
    100 * type_stats["CoARA_members"] / type_stats["Institutions"]
).map(lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%")

type_stats["Type code"] = type_stats["type"].apply(format_plain_text)
type_stats["Institution type"] = type_stats["type"].apply(format_type_label)

type_stats = (
    type_stats.rename(columns={"CoARA_members": "CoARA members"})
    .sort_values(["type_order", "Institution type"])
    .loc[
        :,
        [
            "Type code",
            "Institution type",
            "Institutions",
            "DORA",
            "DORA %",
            "CoARA",
            "CoARA %",
            "CoARA members",
            "CoARA member %",
        ],
    ]
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

display_html_table(type_stats)
```

#### Download Data

```{python}
#| echo: false
download_html = """
<div class="dashboard-download">
  <p>Download the full dataset used in this dashboard.</p>
  <div class="dashboard-download-actions">
    <a class="btn btn-primary" href="hei.csv" download="hei.csv">Download CSV</a>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="hei.xlsx" download="hei.xlsx">
      Download Excel (.xlsx)
    </a>
  </div>
  <p class="dashboard-download-note">
    The Excel download is a real workbook export of the same dataset.
  </p>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(download_html))
```
